Part.Source: Event Start tbResultado.Visible = 0 loadwwpContext.Call(&WwpContext) padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#IMPORTARTABELAIMPOSTO#', &PesCod, &EmpCod, &padObs, &padDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'T') &sdtItensTabelaImposto.FromJson(&PadObs) retornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(&WwpContext.EmpCod, &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpFilCod, &FiLRegTrib, &CImpOriUfeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) sdtItensTabelaImposto_EmpCod.Visible = False sdtItensTabelaImposto_ImpFilCod.Visible = False Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = 0 Grid_TitlesCategories.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid1.Rows = 50 &Grid1CurrentPage = 1 &Grid1CurrentPage.Visible = False &Grid1PageCount = -1 Grid1PaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid1.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ImpCatCodNom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' //The variable '&Grid1PageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridPageCount = 1 EndEvent Event Grid.Load &gridImpLctCod = &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpLctCod &gridImpFilCod = &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpFilCod &gridImpUfeCod = &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpUfeCod &gridImpGruImpCod = &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpGruImpCod For &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem in &sdtItensTabelaImposto.Itens &ErroLancamento = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ErroLancamento &ImpCatCod= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCatCod &ImpCatNom= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCatNom &ImpCatCodNom= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCatCodNom /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &DetailWebComponent = !'' Do Case Case &ErroLancamento = 'E' &GridBadge = !"" Otherwise &GridBadge = '' EndCase &ImpCatCodNom.ColumnClass = iif(&ImpCatCod = 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &ImpCfoCod= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCfoCod &SitCod= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.SitCod.ToFormattedString() &ImpAlqIcmInt= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmInt.ToFormattedString()) &ImpRedAlqIcmInt= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpRedAlqIcmInt.ToFormattedString()) &ImpDif= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpDif.ToFormattedString()) &ImpALqIcmUFDest= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpALqIcmUFDest.ToFormattedString()) &ImpCBenef= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCBenef &ImpIcmsMotDes= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIcmsMotDes.ToFormattedString() &ImpIcmsRet= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIcmsRet.ToFormattedString()) &ImpExcPisCofins = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpExcPisCofins.ToFormattedString() //ST &ImpAlqIcmExt= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmExt.ToFormattedString()) &ImpAlqMVA= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqMVA.ToFormattedString()) &ImpRedAlqIcmExt= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpRedAlqIcmExt.ToFormattedString()) &ImpTaxFecop= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpTaxFecop.ToFormattedString()) &ImpAlqIcmStUF= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmStUF.ToFormattedString()) //IPI &ImpIPI= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIPI.ToFormattedString()) &ImpCstIpi= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstIpi &ImpIncIpi= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIncIpi &ImpIpiEnq= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIpiEnq //PIS &ImpPis= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpPis.ToFormattedString()) &ImpPisRed= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpPisRed.ToFormattedString()) &ImpCstPis= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstPis.ToFormattedString() //COFINS &ImpCofins= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCofins.ToFormattedString()) &ImpCofinsRed= RetiraZerosDepoisVirgulaxCasas.Udp(0,&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCofinsRed.ToFormattedString()) &ImpCstCofins= &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstCofins.ToFormattedString() &ObservacaoLongVarchar = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ObservacaoLongVarchar &sdtItensTabelaImpostoaux.EmpCod = &EmpCod &sdtItensTabelaImpostoaux.ImpFilCod = &gridImpFilCod &sdtItensTabelaImpostoaux.ImpLctCod = &gridImpLctCod &sdtItensTabelaImpostoaux.ImpUfeCod = &gridImpUfeCod &sdtItensTabelaImpostoaux.ImpGruImpCod = &gridImpGruImpCod do 'FormataCampos' Load EndFor EndEvent Event Grid1.Load For &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem in &sdtObservacaoNotaRetorno &resultadoMensagem = &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem.ObsNom if &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem.ObsSts = 'S' &resultadoMensagem.ForeColor = RGB(0,102,0) Else &resultadoMensagem.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ load EndFor EndEvent Event Grid1PaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case Grid1PaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &Grid1CurrentPage -= 1 Grid1.PreviousPage() Case Grid1PaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &Grid1CurrentPage += 1 Grid1.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(Grid1PaginationBar.SelectedPage) &Grid1CurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid1.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid1PaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid1.Rows = Grid1PaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &Grid1CurrentPage = 1 Grid1.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoGravarConfiguracoes' //GRAVA IMPOSTOS For &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem in &sdtItensTabelaImposto.Itens if &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ErroLancamento <> 'E' &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs = new() &sdtObservacaoNota.Clear() &sdtObservacaoNotaAux.FromJson(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ObservacaoLongVarchar) For &sdtObservacaoNotaAuxItem in &sdtObservacaoNotaAux //PEGA SOMENTE AS OBS QUE VAO FICAR. if &sdtObservacaoNotaAuxItem.ObsSts <> 'X' and &sdtObservacaoNotaAuxItem.ObsSts <> 'Z' &sdtObservacaoNotaItem =new() &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.obsCod = &sdtObservacaoNotaAuxItem.ObsCod if &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.obsCod.IsEmpty() prcAnalisaJaExisteObsNota.Call(&EmpCod, &sdtObservacaoNotaAuxItem.ObsNom, &ObsCod) &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.obsCod = &ObsCod Endif //&sdtTabelaIMpostoObsItem.ObsNom = &sdtObservacaoNotaAuxItem.ObsNom &sdtObservacaoNota.Add(&sdtObservacaoNotaItem) Endif EndFor &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.EmpCod = &EmpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpLctCod = &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpLctCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTbFilCod = &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpFilCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpOriUfeCod = &CImpOriUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDstUfeCod = &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpGruImpCod = &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpGruImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCatCod = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.IMpCatCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCfoCod = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCfoCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqMVA &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.impAlqIcmInt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpRedAlqIcmInt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmExt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpRedAlqIcmExt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpDif &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofins = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCofins // &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstCofins = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstCofins &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofinsRed = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCofinsRed &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPis = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpPis &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstPisCofins = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstPis &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPisRed = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpPisRed &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIPI = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIPI &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstIpi = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstIpi &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIpiEnq = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIpiEnq &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni = serverdate() if &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.SitCod > 99 &Varchar = padL(trim(str(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.SitCod)), 3, '0') Else &Varchar = padL(trim(str(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.SitCod)), 2, '0') Endif &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstCod.FromString(&Varchar) &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCBenef = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCBenef &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpALqIcmUFDest = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpALqIcmUFDest &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmStUF = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmStUF &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIcmsMotDes &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTaxFecop = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpTaxFecop &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsRet = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIcmsRet // &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpObsInf = 'JASPI' &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIncIpi = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIncIpi &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpExcPisCofins = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpExcPisCofins // For &sdtObservacaoNotaItem in &sdtObservacaoNota // &sdtTabelaIMpostoObs = new() // &sdtTabelaIMpostoObs.ObsCod = &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod // &sdtTabelaIMposto.Obs.Add(&sdtTabelaIMpostoObs) // EndFor // &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.wwpContextUserName = &WwpContext.UserName if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIpiEnq.IsEmpty() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIpiEnq = 999 Endif prcGravaNovaConfiguracaoImposto.Call('ADD', &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs, &sdtObservacaoNota) &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem = new() &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem.ObsCod = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.IMpCatCod &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem.ObsNom = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.IMpCatCodNom + ' | ' + &Mensagem &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem.ObsSts = 'S' &sdtObservacaoNotaRetorno.Add(&sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem) //GravaTabelaImposto.Call(&EmpCod, &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpFilCod, &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpLctCod, &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpUfeCod, &sdtItensTabelaImposto.ImpGruImpCod, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCatCod, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqMVA, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.impAlqIcmInt, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpRedAlqIcmInt, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmExt, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpRedAlqIcmExt, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpDif, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCofins, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpPis, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIPI, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.SitCod, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCBenef, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIcmsMotDes, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCfoCod, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstCofins, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstPis, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstIpi, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpALqIcmUFDest, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpPisRed, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCofinsRed, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpTaxFecop, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIcmsRet, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmStUF, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIncIpi, &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpExcPisCofins, &sdtObservacaoNota, &WwpContext.UserName, &Mensagem) Else &Mensagem = '' &sdtObservacaoNotaAux.FromJson(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ObservacaoLongVarchar) For &sdtObservacaoNotaAuxItem in &sdtObservacaoNotaAux //PEGA SOMENTE AS OBS QUE VAO FICAR. if &sdtObservacaoNotaAuxItem.ObsSts = 'Z' &Mensagem += ' | ' + &sdtObservacaoNotaAuxItem.ObsNom Endif EndFor &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem = new() &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem.ObsCod = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.IMpCatCod &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem.ObsNom = &sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.IMpCatCodNom + ' | ' + &Mensagem &sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem.ObsSts = 'E' &sdtObservacaoNotaRetorno.Add(&sdtObservacaoNotaRetornoItem) Endif EndFor prcApagaObservacoesNaoUtilizadas.Call(&EmpCod) tbResultado.Visible = 1 Grid1.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoCancelar' Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = wcTabelaImpostoObservacoes.Create(&ObservacaoLongVarchar) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'FormataCampos' For Each Order EmpCod, CImpLctCod, CImpTbFilCod, CImpOriUfeCod, CImpDstUfeCod, CImpGruImpCod, CImpCatCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CImpLctCod = &gridImpLctCod Where CImpTbFilCod = &gridImpFilCod Where CImpOriUfeCod = &CImpOriUfeCod Where CImpDstUfeCod = &gridImpUfeCod Where CImpGruImpCod = &gridImpGruImpCod Where CImpCatCod = &ImpCatCod &ImpCfoCod.ColumnClass = iif(&ImpCfoCod <> CImpCfoCod, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &Varchar = CImpCstCod.ToString() &Numeric = Val(&Varchar) &SitCod.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.SitCod <> &Numeric, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpAlqIcmInt.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmInt <> CImpAlqIcmInt, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpRedAlqIcmInt.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpRedAlqIcmInt <> CImpRedAlqIcmInt, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpDif.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpDif <> CImpDif, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpALqIcmUFDest.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpALqIcmUFDest <> CImpAlqIcmUFDest, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpCBenef.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCBenef.Trim() <> CImpCBenef.Trim(), !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpIcmsMotDes.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIcmsMotDes <> CImpIcmsMotDes, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpIcmsRet.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIcmsRet <> CImpIcmsRet, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpExcPisCofins.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpExcPisCofins <> CImpExcPisCofins, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpAlqIcmExt.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmExt <> CImpAlqIcmExt, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpAlqMVA.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqMVA <> CImpAlqMVA, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpRedAlqIcmExt.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpRedAlqIcmExt <> CImpRedAlqIcmExt, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpTaxFecop.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpTaxFecop <> CImpTaxFecop, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpAlqIcmStUF.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpAlqIcmStUF <> CImpAlqIcmStUF, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpIPI.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIPI <> CImpIpi, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpCstIpi.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstIpi <> CImpCstIpi, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpIncIpi.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIncIpi <> CImpIncIPI, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpIpiEnq.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpIpiEnq <> CImpIpiEnq, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpPis.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpPis <> CImpPis, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpPisRed.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpPisRed <> CImpPisRed, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpCstPis.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstPis <> CImpCstPisCofins, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpCofins.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCofins <> CImpCofins, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ImpCofinsRed.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCofinsRed <> CImpCofinsRed, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &Varchar = CImpCstPisCofins.ToString() &ImpCstCofins.ColumnClass = iif(&sdtItensTabelaImpostoItem.ImpCstCofins <> &Varchar, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') Exit When none &ImpCfoCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &SitCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpAlqIcmInt.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpRedAlqIcmInt.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpDif.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpALqIcmUFDest.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpCBenef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpIcmsMotDes.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpIcmsRet.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpExcPisCofins.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpAlqIcmExt.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpAlqMVA.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpRedAlqIcmExt.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpTaxFecop.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpAlqIcmStUF.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpIPI.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpCstIpi.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpIncIpi.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpIpiEnq.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpPis.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpPisRed.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpCstPis.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpCofins.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpCofinsRed.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' &ImpCstCofins.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn' EndFor EndSub
